ocr_findings.description: OCR header reads '試験にはつしか出る！' — mascot label 'コシが出る！' misread as 'つしか出る！'; recurring low-severity pattern.

Image shows IoTゲートウェイ diagram (IoTデバイス → IoTゲートウェイ → インターネット → IoTサーバ) with device labels; OCR represents as image placeholder, diagram caption labels not captured in text. Low severity as diagram labels are covered in the callout bullet below.
Society 5.0 definition quote in image ends with '人間中心の社会（Society）' — OCR captures this correctly but the closing quote mark/bracket in image is '）' which matches OCR. No loss.

reviewer_notes: Page covers IoTゲートウェイ explanation with diagram, a 試験ポイント callout box with 4 IoT-related bullet points, and Society 5.0 section with the official definition quote. All substantive text faithfully captured. IoT device diagram labels (IoTデバイス, IoTゲートウェイ, インターネット, IoTサーバ) are covered by the callout bullets so no meaning is lost. Page footer '162' in image corresponds to pipeline page_178 offset.
